diff --git a/src/modules/cli/commands/bootstrap-neural-search.command.ts b/src/modules/cli/commands/bootstrap-neural-search.command.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..9623564
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/modules/cli/commands/bootstrap-neural-search.command.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,398 @@
+import { Logger } from '@nestjs/common';
+import { Command, CommandRunner, Option } from 'nest-commander';
+
+import { StylesMvModel } from '@modules/db/styles-mv/models/styles-mv.model';
+import { EnvConfigService } from '@modules/env-config/env-config.service';
+import { OpensearchNeuralService } from '@modules/opensearch/opensearch-neural.service';
+import { OpensearchService } from '@modules/opensearch/opensearch.service';
+
+import { runWithConcurrencyLimit } from '@utils/concurrency-pool.util';
+import { ProgressBar } from '@utils/progress-bar.util';
+
+import { OPENSEARCH_INDEX_NAME } from '@constants/env-variables.constant';
+
+import { CronJobExecution } from '@decorators/cron-job-execution.decorator';
+
+const MODEL_NAME = 'huggingface/sentence-transformers/all-distilroberta-v1';
+const MODEL_VERSION = '1.0.1';
+const MODEL_GROUP_NAME = 'neural-search-model-group';
+const INGEST_PIPELINE_ID = 'products-neural-pipeline';
+const SEARCH_PIPELINE_ID = 'hybrid-search-pipeline';
+
+interface BootstrapNeuralSearchOptions {
+	modelFormat?: string;
+	batchSize?: number;
+	concurrency?: number;
+	cleanup?: boolean;
+}
+
+@Command({
+	name: 'bootstrap-neural-search',
+	description:
+		'Full neural search bootstrap: configure cluster, train model, create index, sync products',
+})
+export class BootstrapNeuralSearchCommand extends CommandRunner {
+	private readonly logger = new Logger(BootstrapNeuralSearchCommand.name);
+	private isShuttingDown = false;
+	private currentOperation: Promise<void> | null = null;
+	private isCancelled = false;
+
+	constructor(
+		private readonly opensearchService: OpensearchService,
+		private readonly opensearchNeuralService: OpensearchNeuralService,
+		private readonly stylesMvModel: StylesMvModel,
+		private readonly configService: EnvConfigService,
+	) {
+		super();
+		this.setupGracefulShutdown();
+	}
+
+	@CronJobExecution({ jobName: 'bootstrap-neural-search' })
+	async run(
+		_passedParams: string[],
+		options: BootstrapNeuralSearchOptions,
+	): Promise<void> {
+		if (this.isShuttingDown) {
+			this.logger.warn('Command cancelled due to shutdown signal');
+			return;
+		}
+
+		const modelFormat = options.modelFormat ?? 'TORCH_SCRIPT';
+		const batchSize = options.batchSize ?? 60;
+		const concurrency = options.concurrency ?? 2;
+		const cleanup = options.cleanup ?? false;
+		const totalSteps = cleanup ? 9 : 8;
+		const startTime = Date.now();
+
+		try {
+			const indexName = this.configService.get<string>({ key: OPENSEARCH_INDEX_NAME });
+
+			let step = 1;
+
+			if (cleanup) {
+				this.logger.log(
+					`=== Step ${step++}/${totalSteps}: Cleaning up existing resources ===`,
+				);
+				await this.cleanupExistingResources({ indexName });
+			}
+
+			this.logger.log(
+				`=== Step ${step++}/${totalSteps}: Configuring cluster ML settings ===`,
+			);
+			await this.opensearchService.configureClusterMLSettings();
+
+			this.logger.log(`=== Step ${step++}/${totalSteps}: Registering model group ===`);
+			const modelGroupId = await this.opensearchService.registerModelGroup({
+				name: MODEL_GROUP_NAME,
+				description: 'Model group for neural search embeddings',
+			});
+
+			this.logger.log(
+				`=== Step ${step++}/${totalSteps}: Registering model (this may take several minutes) ===`,
+			);
+			const registerTaskId = await this.opensearchService.registerModel({
+				name: MODEL_NAME,
+				version: MODEL_VERSION,
+				modelGroupId,
+				modelFormat,
+			});
+
+			this.logger.log('Waiting for model registration to complete...');
+			const registerResult = await this.opensearchService.waitForTask({
+				taskId: registerTaskId,
+				intervalMs: 10000,
+				maxAttempts: 120,
+			});
+			const modelId = registerResult.model_id;
+
+			if (!modelId) {
+				throw new Error('Model registration completed but no model_id returned');
+			}
+
+			this.logger.log(`Model registered: ${modelId}`);
+
+			this.logger.log(
+				`=== Step ${step++}/${totalSteps}: Deploying model (this may take several minutes) ===`,
+			);
+			const deployTaskId = await this.opensearchService.deployModel({ modelId });
+
+			this.logger.log('Waiting for model deployment to complete...');
+			await this.opensearchService.waitForTask({
+				taskId: deployTaskId,
+				intervalMs: 10000,
+				maxAttempts: 120,
+			});
+			this.logger.log('Model deployed successfully');
+
+			this.logger.log(`=== Step ${step++}/${totalSteps}: Creating ingest pipeline ===`);
+			await this.opensearchService.createIngestPipeline({
+				pipelineId: INGEST_PIPELINE_ID,
+				modelId,
+				sourceField: 'combined_text_for_embedding',
+				targetField: 'product_embedding',
+			});
+
+			this.logger.log(`=== Step ${step++}/${totalSteps}: Creating search pipeline ===`);
+			await this.opensearchService.createSearchPipeline({
+				pipelineId: SEARCH_PIPELINE_ID,
+				normalizationTechnique: 'min_max',
+				combinationTechnique: 'arithmetic_mean',
+				weights: [0.1, 0.9],
+			});
+
+			this.logger.log(
+				`=== Step ${step++}/${totalSteps}: Creating index ${indexName} ===`,
+			);
+			await this.opensearchNeuralService.createProductsIndex({ indexName });
+
+			if (this.isCancelled) {
+				this.logger.warn('Bootstrap cancelled before product sync');
+				return;
+			}
+
+			this.logger.log(
+				`=== Step ${step}/${totalSteps}: Syncing products (embedding generation on ingest) ===`,
+			);
+			this.logger.log(`Batch size: ${batchSize}, Concurrency: ${concurrency}`);
+
+			const totalCount = await this.stylesMvModel.count();
+			this.logger.log(`Total products to index: ${totalCount}`);
+
+			if (totalCount === 0) {
+				this.logger.warn('No products found to index');
+				return;
+			}
+
+			const totalBatches = Math.ceil(totalCount / batchSize);
+			const batches = Array.from({ length: totalBatches }, (_, i) => ({
+				offset: i * batchSize,
+				limit: batchSize,
+			}));
+
+			const progressBar = new ProgressBar({ total: totalCount });
+			let totalIndexed = 0;
+			let totalErrors = 0;
+
+			this.currentOperation = this.processBatches({
+				batches,
+				concurrency,
+				indexName,
+				progressBar,
+				onBatchComplete: (indexed, errors) => {
+					totalIndexed += indexed;
+					totalErrors += errors;
+				},
+			});
+
+			await this.currentOperation;
+
+			// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unnecessary-condition
+			if (!this.isCancelled) {
+				progressBar.finish();
+			}
+
+			const duration = ((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000).toFixed(1);
+
+			this.logger.log('=== Bootstrap complete ===');
+			this.logger.log(`Duration: ${duration}s`);
+			this.logger.log(`Products indexed: ${totalIndexed}, Errors: ${totalErrors}`);
+			this.logger.log(`Model ID: ${modelId} (resolved dynamically at app startup)`);
+		} catch (error) {
+			// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unnecessary-condition
+			if (this.isShuttingDown || this.isCancelled) {
+				this.logger.warn('Command interrupted during shutdown');
+				return;
+			}
+			this.logger.error(`Bootstrap failed: ${(error as Error).message}`);
+			process.exit(1);
+		} finally {
+			this.currentOperation = null;
+		}
+	}
+
+	private async cleanupExistingResources({
+		indexName,
+	}: {
+		indexName: string;
+	}): Promise<void> {
+		this.logger.log('Deleting index...');
+		await this.opensearchService.deleteIndex({ indexName });
+
+		this.logger.log('Deleting pipelines...');
+		await this.opensearchService.deleteSearchPipeline({ pipelineId: SEARCH_PIPELINE_ID });
+		await this.opensearchService.deleteIngestPipeline({ pipelineId: INGEST_PIPELINE_ID });
+
+		this.logger.log('Looking for existing model group...');
+		const modelGroupId = await this.opensearchService.searchModelGroupByName({
+			name: MODEL_GROUP_NAME,
+		});
+
+		if (modelGroupId) {
+			this.logger.log(`Found model group: ${modelGroupId}, cleaning up models...`);
+			const models = await this.opensearchService.searchModelsByGroup({ modelGroupId });
+
+			for (const model of models) {
+				if (model.model_state === 'DEPLOYED' || model.model_state === 'DEPLOYING') {
+					this.logger.log(`Undeploying model: ${model.model_id}`);
+					await this.opensearchService.undeployModel({ modelId: model.model_id });
+					await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 3000));
+				}
+
+				this.logger.log(`Deleting model: ${model.model_id}`);
+				await this.opensearchService.deleteModel({ modelId: model.model_id });
+			}
+
+			this.logger.log('Deleting model group...');
+			await this.opensearchService.deleteModelGroup({ modelGroupId });
+			this.logger.log('Waiting for ML index refresh...');
+			await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 10000));
+		} else {
+			this.logger.log('No existing model group found');
+		}
+
+		this.logger.log('Cleanup complete');
+	}
+
+	private async processBatches({
+		batches,
+		concurrency,
+		indexName,
+		progressBar,
+		onBatchComplete,
+	}: {
+		batches: { offset: number; limit: number }[];
+		concurrency: number;
+		indexName: string;
+		progressBar: ProgressBar;
+		onBatchComplete: (indexed: number, errors: number) => void;
+	}): Promise<void> {
+		await runWithConcurrencyLimit({
+			items: batches,
+			concurrency,
+			handler: async (batch) => {
+				if (this.isCancelled) {
+					return { indexed: 0, errors: 0 };
+				}
+
+				const styles = await this.stylesMvModel.findAll({
+					limit: batch.limit,
+					offset: batch.offset,
+				});
+
+				if (styles.length === 0) {
+					return { indexed: 0, errors: 0 };
+				}
+
+				return this.opensearchNeuralService.bulkIndexProducts({
+					indexName,
+					styles,
+				});
+			},
+			onItemComplete: (result) => {
+				progressBar.increment(result.indexed + result.errors);
+				onBatchComplete(result.indexed, result.errors);
+			},
+			onItemError: (error) => {
+				this.logger.error(`Batch processing error: ${(error as Error).message}`);
+			},
+		});
+	}
+
+	@Option({
+		flags: '-f, --model-format <modelFormat>',
+		description: 'Model format: TORCH_SCRIPT or ONNX (default: TORCH_SCRIPT)',
+	})
+	parseModelFormat(value: string): string {
+		const valid = ['TORCH_SCRIPT', 'ONNX'];
+		if (!valid.includes(value)) {
+			throw new Error(`Model format must be one of: ${valid.join(', ')}`);
+		}
+		return value;
+	}
+
+	@Option({
+		flags: '-b, --batch-size <batchSize>',
+		description: 'Products per batch (default: 150)',
+	})
+	parseBatchSize(value: string): number {
+		const size = parseInt(value, 10);
+		if (isNaN(size) || size < 1 || size > 1000) {
+			throw new Error('Batch size must be between 1 and 1000');
+		}
+		return size;
+	}
+
+	@Option({
+		flags: '-c, --concurrency <concurrency>',
+		description: 'Concurrent batch operations (default: 5)',
+	})
+	parseConcurrency(value: string): number {
+		const conc = parseInt(value, 10);
+		if (isNaN(conc) || conc < 1 || conc > 20) {
+			throw new Error('Concurrency must be between 1 and 20');
+		}
+		return conc;
+	}
+
+	@Option({
+		flags: '--cleanup',
+		description: 'Delete existing index, pipelines, and models before bootstrapping',
+	})
+	parseCleanup(): boolean {
+		return true;
+	}
+
+	private setupGracefulShutdown(): void {
+		const signals: NodeJS.Signals[] = ['SIGTERM', 'SIGINT', 'SIGHUP', 'SIGQUIT'];
+
+		signals.forEach((signal) => {
+			process.on(signal, () => {
+				void this.handleShutdown(signal);
+			});
+		});
+
+		process.on('uncaughtException', (error) => {

content.text:
Here's the full analysis:

---

## What Was Done — Main Points

**1. OpenSearch infrastructure added**
- `OpensearchService` — low-level client wrapper: index CRUD, bulk indexing, ML model lifecycle (register/deploy/undeploy/delete), ingest & search pipeline management
- `OpensearchNeuralService` — high-level product search: hybrid neural+BM25 queries, query enhancement (brand/color/size/gender/price detection), product document transformation
- `OpensearchModule` — NestJS module wiring both services

**2. ML model pipeline (HuggingFace)**
- Model: `huggingface/sentence-transformers/all-distilroberta-v1` (v1.0.1, TORCH_SCRIPT)
- Model group: `neural-search-model-group`
- Ingest pipeline: `products-neural-pipeline` — auto-generates `product_embedding` from `combined_text_for_embedding` on document ingest
- Search pipeline: `hybrid-search-pipeline` — min_max normalization, arithmetic_mean combination, weights [BM25=0.2, Neural=0.8]

**3. Two CLI bootstrap commands**
- `setup-neural-search` — registers model group, model, deploys it, creates both pipelines (skippable steps)
- `bootstrap-neural-search` — full end-to-end: cluster settings → model → pipelines → index creation → bulk product sync with concurrency control and graceful shutdown

**4. REST API — `/api/v1/neural-search`**
- `GET /neural-search?q=...` — free-text neural search
- `GET /neural-search/use-case/:useCase` — business use-case search (Onboarding, Trade Shows, Events, Gifting, Uniforming, Spirit Wear, etc.)
- `GET /neural-search/view` — HTML debug page with product cards

**5. Local dev environment**
- Docker Compose: OpenSearch 2.11.0 node + OpenSearch Dashboards 2.11.0 on ports `9201`/`5601`
- ML commons pre-configured in Docker: `only_run_on_ml_node=false`, memory threshold 99%, 2GB heap

**6. New env vars**: `OPENSEARCH_HOST`, `OPENSEARCH_USERNAME`, `OPENSEARCH_PASSWORD`, `OPENSEARCH_INDEX_NAME`, `OPENSEARCH_NEURAL_CACHE_TTL`, `OPENSEARCH_DASHBOARDS_URL`

---

## OpenSearch Setup — What Needs to Be Done and How

### Step 1 — Cluster ML Settings

Must be applied once per cluster. The app does this automatically via `configureClusterMLSettings()`:

```json
PUT /_cluster/settings
{
  "persistent": {
    "plugins.ml_commons.only_run_on_ml_node": false,
    "plugins.ml_commons.model_access_control_enabled": true,
    "plugins.ml_commons.native_memory_threshold": 99
  }
}
```

**Why**: By default ML tasks only run on dedicated ML nodes. Setting `only_run_on_ml_node=false` allows a single-node cluster (local/staging) to run them on data nodes.

---

### Step 2 — Model Group Registration

```json
POST /_plugins/_ml/model_groups/_register
{
  "name": "neural-search-model-group",
  "description": "Model group for neural search embeddings"
}
```
Returns: `model_group_id`

---

### Step 3 — Model Registration

```json
POST /_plugins/_ml/models/_register
{
  "name": "huggingface/sentence-transformers/all-distilroberta-v1",
  "version": "1.0.1",
  "model_group_id": "<model_group_id>",
  "model_format": "TORCH_SCRIPT"
}
```
Returns: `task_id` — poll `GET /_plugins/_ml/tasks/<task_id>` until `state=COMPLETED`.  
**Note**: Takes several minutes on first run — downloads model from HuggingFace.

---

### Step 4 — Model Deployment

```json
POST /_plugins/_ml/models/<model_id>/_deploy
```
Returns: `task_id` — poll until `COMPLETED`. Model `model_id` is then stored in memory by the app and refreshed every 5 minutes via `@Interval`.

---

### Step 5 — Ingest Pipeline

Converts `combined_text_for_embedding` → `product_embedding` (768-dim vector) on every indexed document:

```json
PUT /_ingest/pipeline/products-neural-pipeline
{
  "description": "Neural search ingest pipeline",
  "processors": [{
    "text_embedding": {
      "model_id": "<model_id>",
      "field_map": {
        "combined_text_for_embedding": "product_embedding"
      }
    }
  }]
}
```

---

### Step 6 — Search Pipeline

Hybrid normalization for combining BM25 + neural scores:

```json
PUT /_search/pipeline/hybrid-search-pipeline
{
  "phase_results_processors": [{
    "normalization-processor": {
      "normalization": { "technique": "min_max" },
      "combination": {
        "technique": "arithmetic_mean",
        "parameters": { "weights": [0.2, 0.8] }
      }
    }
  }]
}
```

Weights: 20% keyword BM25, 80% neural vector. Tunable.

---

### Step 7 — Index Creation

Index `products-neural-search` with KNN enabled:

```json
PUT /products-neural-search
{
  "settings": {
    "number_of_shards": 3,
    "number_of_replicas": 1,
    "index.knn": true,
    "index.knn.algo_param.ef_search": 512,
    "default_pipeline": "products-neural-pipeline"
  },
  "mappings": {
    "properties": {
      "product_embedding": {
        "type": "knn_vector",
        "dimension": 768,
        "method": {
          "name": "hnsw",
          "space_type": "l2",
          "engine": "faiss",
          "parameters": { "ef_construction": 512, "m": 48 }
        }
      },
      "combined_text_for_embedding": { "type": "text" },
      "status": { "type": "keyword" },
      "product_id": { "type": "long" },
      "price": { "type": "float" },
      "price_level": { "type": "short" },
      "product_type": { "type": "keyword" },
      "broad_category_names": { "type": "keyword" },
      "sub_category_names": { "type": "keyword" },
      "brand": { "type": "keyword" },
      "sizes": { "type": "keyword" },
      "colors": {
        "type": "nested",
        "properties": { "name": { "type": "keyword" }, "image_url": { "type": "keyword" } }
      }
      // ... all other fields
    }
  }
}
```

**Key**: `default_pipeline` is set so every bulk ingest auto-triggers embedding generation.

---

### Step 8 — Bulk Product Indexing

Run `bootstrap-neural-search` CLI which:
1. Paginates through `styles_mv` table (MySQL)
2. Transforms each style into an `IOpensearchProduct` document with `combined_text_for_embedding` built from: name, product_type, price_level, brand, condensed_features, style_type, category, manufacturer, sub-categories, decoration_method, features
3. Bulk-indexes in batches (default 60, concurrency 2)
4. OpenSearch ingest pipeline auto-generates vectors on write

```bash
npm run cli:dev -- bootstrap-neural-search --batch-size 60 --concurrency 2
# Full rebuild:
npm run cli:dev -- bootstrap-neural-search --cleanup
```

---

### Summary of Resources Created in OpenSearch

| Resource | Name | Type |
|---|---|---|
| Model group | `neural-search-model-group` | ML model group |
| Model | `all-distilroberta-v1` v1.0.1 | Sentence transformer, 768 dim |
| Ingest pipeline | `products-neural-pipeline` | text_embedding processor |
| Search pipeline | `hybrid-search-pipeline` | normalization-processor |
| Index | `products-neural-search` | KNN index, HNSW/faiss, l2 |

content.text:
DevOps needs to do two things: **provision the cluster** and **run the one-time bootstrap**.

---

## DevOps — OpenSearch Setup Checklist

### 1. Provision OpenSearch Cluster

Minimum requirements:
- **Version**: 2.11.0+
- **ML plugin**: must be included (it is in the standard OpenSearch image)
- **Memory**: ≥4GB RAM per node (model loading is heavy — 2GB heap minimum)
- **Single node is fine** for staging; production should have 3+ nodes

If using **AWS OpenSearch Service**:
- Engine version: OpenSearch 2.11
- Instance type: `r6g.large.search` minimum (needs memory for ML)
- Enable ML features: not a separate toggle on AWS — just use a supported instance

If **self-hosted** (Docker/K8s), the local docker-compose is the reference:
```yaml
opensearch:
  image: opensearchproject/opensearch:2.11.0
  environment:
    - discovery.type=single-node          # for single node
    - plugins.security.disabled=true       # or configure TLS properly
    - OPENSEARCH_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms2g -Xmx2g
```

---

### 2. Set App Environment Variables

Provide these to the app deployment:

```bash
OPENSEARCH_HOST=https://<opensearch-host>:9200
OPENSEARCH_USERNAME=<username>
OPENSEARCH_PASSWORD=<password>
OPENSEARCH_INDEX_NAME=products-neural-search
OPENSEARCH_NEURAL_CACHE_TTL=3600
OPENSEARCH_DASHBOARDS_URL=https://<dashboards-host>:5601  # optional
```

---

### 3. Run One-Time Bootstrap (after app is deployed)

This is run **once** per environment. It registers the ML model, deploys it, creates pipelines, creates the index, and indexes all products:

```bash
npm run cli:prod -- bootstrap-neural-search
```

- Takes **10–30 minutes** on first run (model download from HuggingFace)
- Needs network access from the cluster to HuggingFace (`huggingface.co`) — **whitelist this if there's egress filtering**
- To rebuild from scratch: add `--cleanup` flag

If it was already partially set up and only pipelines/index need recreation:
```bash
npm run cli:prod -- setup-neural-search --skip-cluster-settings
```

---

### 4. Verify It Worked

```bash
# Cluster health
curl -u admin:pass https://<host>:9200/_cluster/health

# Model is deployed
curl -u admin:pass -X POST https://<host>:9200/_plugins/_ml/models/_search \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"query":{"match_all":{}}}'

# Index exists and has documents
curl -u admin:pass https://<host>:9200/products-neural-search/_count
```

---

### TL;DR for DevOps

1. Spin up OpenSearch 2.11+ with ≥4GB RAM, ML plugin enabled
2. Set 5 env vars on the app
3. Ensure outbound HTTPS to `huggingface.co` is allowed
4. Run `npm run cli:prod -- bootstrap-neural-search` once
5. Done — app auto-discovers the deployed model on startup

**r6g.large.search** — 2 vCPUs, 16 GB RAM (Graviton2)

| Pricing | Cost |
|---|---|
| On-demand | ~$0.167/hr → **~$122/month** |
| 1yr Reserved (no upfront) | ~$0.106/hr → **~$77/month** |
| 1yr Reserved (all upfront) | ~**$67/month** |

Prices vary by region (us-east-1 is typically cheapest).

**Note on sizing**: r6g.large may be overkill just for the ML model (`all-distilroberta-v1` is ~300MB). If budget is tight, `r6g.medium.search` (1 vCPU, 8GB) at ~$60/month on-demand could work for staging. Production with real load → stick with large or go xlarge.
